prompt: Miss Marple is neither a good singer or the good stage artist.
reason: Option (a) is correct. यहां 'or' की जगह 'nor' आएगा क्योंकि 'Neither' के साथ 'nor' का use किया जाता है।

prompt: Either Ramesh or Reema have the keys to the cupboard.
reason: Option (c) is correct. यहां Reema के अनुसार singular verb 'has' आयेगी क्योंकि जब दो Subject 'Either...or' से जुड़े हो तो Verb नजदीक वाले Subject के अनुसार आती है।

prompt: Neither Sam nor I are interested in attending the meeting.
reason: Option (d) is correct. यहां 'I' के अनुसार verb 'am' आयेगी क्योंकि जब दो Subject 'Neither...nor' से जुड़े हो तो Verb नजदीक वाले Subject के अनुसार आती है।

prompt: Neither Mohit nor Rohit were there at the shop when I went there.
reason: Option (c) is correct. यहां Rohit के अनुसार singular verb 'was' आयेगी क्योंकि जब दो Subject 'Neither...nor' से जुड़े हो तो Verb नजदीक वाले Subject के अनुसार आती है।

prompt: Either Avika or Nikunj are going to win the prize in the handwriting competition.
reason: Option (d) is correct. यहां Nikunj के अनुसार singular verb 'is' आयेगी क्योंकि जब दो Subject 'Either...or' से जुड़े हो तो Verb नजदीक वाले Subject के अनुसार आती है।

prompt: Neither I nor my sisters was interested in learning music.
reason: Option (c) is correct. यहां sisters के अनुसार plural verb 'were' आयेगी क्योंकि जब दो Subject 'Neither...nor' से जुड़े हो तो Verb नजदीक वाले Subject के अनुसार आती है।

prompt: Neither Amit nor Raju are staying with his parents in Mumbai.
reason: Option (a) is correct. यहां Raju के अनुसार singular verb 'is' आयेगी क्योंकि जब दो Subject 'Neither...nor' से जुड़े हो तो Verb नजदीक वाले Subject के अनुसार आती है।

prompt: Different-coloured natural foods not only put a smile on children's faces and also benefit their overall growth.
options: put a smile on children's faces
reason: Option (b) is correct. 'and also' की जगह 'but also' आएगा क्योंकि 'Not only' के साथ 'but also' का use किया जाता है।

prompt: This was no strange sight to the boy by that time, for he had neither gun or spear.
options: to the boy by that time,
for he had neither gun or spear.
reason: Option (b) is correct. 'or' की जगह 'nor' आएगा क्योंकि 'Neither' के साथ 'nor' आता है।

prompt: They know they will face either a swift backlash or deafening silence.
reason: Option (a) is correct. There is no error. 'Either' is correctly paired with 'or'.

prompt:
Select the most appropriate option to substitute the bracketed segment in the given sentence.
The secretary to my boss is very efficient as he not only gives him the required information (and also handles) correspondence independently.
reason: Option (a) is correct. 'Not only' के साथ 'but also' का use किया जाता है।

prompt:
Select the most appropriate option to substitute the bracketed segment in the given sentence.
Neither the directors nor the Chairman (were available to) interrogation.
reason: Option (c) is correct. यहां Chairman के अनुसार singular verb 'was' आयेगी क्योंकि जब दो Subject 'Neither...nor' से जुड़े हो तो Verb नजदीक वाले Subject के अनुसार आती है।
